guide.description: From the wind of the surf to the silence of history, a unique story is hidden in every corner of Alacati. Which path will you choose?
guide.empty: This story hasn't been written yet...

historicalPlaces.title: Historical Alacati Windmills
historicalPlaces.description: The signature silhouette of Alacati. For over 150 years, these structures have turned the wind into abundance and now offer a unique terrace for sunset.
historicalPlaces.details: Exquisite examples of stone craftsmanship, these mills were once used to grind wheat. Today, they stand as the most iconic symbols of Alacati, welcoming guests to witness the town's history.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Entrance is free. The ideal time for photography is 30 minutes before sunset.

historicalPlaces.title: Pazaryeri Mosque
historicalPlaces.description: A former Greek church converted into a mosque, this structure is a symbol of tolerance and multiculturalism with its preserved iconography.
historicalPlaces.details: Originally built as the Ayios Konstantinos Church, the building is a rare example of harmony, still carrying the traces of both Christian and Islamic cultures under the same roof.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Look closely at the 'podima' pebble mosaics in the courtyard.

historicalPlaces.title: Cesme Castle
historicalPlaces.description: Built during the reign of Bayezid II, the castle stands as a witness to history with its museum and unparalleled harbor views.
historicalPlaces.details: One of the most robust examples of Ottoman military architecture, Cesme Castle sheds light on thousands of years of regional history through its archaeology museum.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Museum Pass is valid. Don't forget to spot Chios Island from the highest bastions.

historicalPlaces.title: Cesme Clock Tower
historicalPlaces.description: A 19th-century Ottoman clock tower that keeps the pulse of history in the heart of Cesme.
historicalPlaces.details: Built in 1901, this tower is not just a landmark but also the gateway to a vibrant bazaar area offering an authentic Cesme atmosphere.
historicalPlaces.visitor_tip: Explore the side streets to find traditional jewelry and local Cesme pepper shops.

sports.title: Windsurfing
sports.description: One of the world's premier surf spots. A hub for adrenaline seekers with its shallow waters and consistent winds 300 days a year.
sports.details: The bay that introduced Alacati to the world is not just for pros; its shallow, wave-free structure makes it one of the safest training areas in the world for beginners.

sports.title: Kitesurfing
sports.description: A high-adrenaline Aegean experience where you feel the sky and sea at the same time.
sports.details: Alacati's winds create the perfect environment for kitesurfing. You can take your first flight under the guidance of experienced instructors.

beaches.title: Ilica Beach
beaches.description: Famous for its warm, healing waters thanks to underwater thermal springs and turquoise shallows that rival the Maldives.
beaches.details: What makes Ilica special are the hot springs bubbling from the seabed, turning the beach into a natural open-air SPA.

beaches.title: Altinkum Beach
beaches.description: Named after its golden sands, this beach is a refreshing stop in the summer heat with its cool waters and sheltered structure.
beaches.details: Boasting some of the clearest waters in the Aegean, Altinkum offers such transparency that you can see every grain of sand on the seabed.

beaches.title: Delikli Koy
beaches.description: A pristine natural wonder famous for its wave-eroded white rocks and a natural bridge, far from the crowds.
beaches.details: Named after the natural opening in the rocks, this bay feels like another planet with its stark white limestone formations. It is a completely natural, undeveloped area.

beaches.title: Akkum Beach
beaches.description: A favorite for families with its shallow turquoise waters, white sand, and calm bay structure.
beaches.details: One of Cesme's most peaceful and natural beaches. Ideal for swimming with its fine sand and absence of stones.

beaches.title: Boyalik Beach
beaches.description: Ideal for a daily beach getaway with its proximity to Cesme center and crystal-clear waters.
beaches.details: Boyalik offers full beach infrastructure with sunbed rentals, cafes, and restaurants.

gourmet.title: Haci Memis Kitchen
gourmet.description: The true culinary heart of Alacati. Discover modern gourmet reinterpretations of local herbs and traditional Aegean recipes.
gourmet.details: Hidden among antique shops and art galleries, Haci Memis is the most intimate spot to escape the crowds and touch the authentic Aegean cuisine.

gourmet.title: Agrilia Restaurant
gourmet.description: The freshest Aegean seafood and an authentic Greek-Turkish culinary synthesis in an elegant atmosphere.
gourmet.details: Hidden inside a stone building, Agrilia is one of Alacati's most romantic restaurants with its blue-clothed tables and garden lighting.

gourmet.title: Asma Yaprağı
gourmet.description: The warmth of a village table amidst ivy-covered stone walls; a place that brings the soul of the Aegean to your plate.
gourmet.details: Perfect for those seeking real Aegean flavors like artichoke in olive oil and homemade desserts.

gourmet.title: Tike Restaurant
gourmet.description: The destination for meat lovers. Alacati's highly acclaimed steakhouse known for its grilling mastery and quality ingredients.
gourmet.details: Serving fresh cuts directly from the butcher to the grill, Tike masters meatballs, lamb chops, and shish kebabs.

gourmet.title: Biberiye Restaurant
gourmet.description: One of Alacati's most refined restaurants with its flowery courtyard and menu inspired by Aegean herbs.
gourmet.details: With a philosophy of seasonal ingredients and creative presentation, Biberiye is the first stop for fine dining in Alacati.

gourmet.title: Dalyan Marina Restaurants
gourmet.description: Fresh fish and seafood with a view of the marina; Cesme's popular coastal restaurants line up here.
gourmet.details: The waterfront restaurants in Dalyan are perfect for unwinding, especially during the golden sunset hours.

activities.title: Cesme Marina
activities.description: Among Turkey's most prestigious marinas, Cesme Marina offers everything from yacht tours to a vibrant bazaar.
activities.details: A walk along the marina, boutique shops, cafes, and sunset views make for the perfect evening.

activities.title: Alacati Port
activities.description: The entertainment hub of Alacati with surf schools, beach bars, and music festivals — surf by day, party by night.
activities.details: Home to the Alacati Herb Festival and surf competitions. The ideal spot to feel Alacati's dynamic and youthful energy.

detail.weather_tip: It's a perfect day to visit today.
detail.hotel_recommendation: As Cemal Alacati Hotel, we highly recommend this route.
